---
title: "Team Backlogs"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, display

_candidates = [Path("quarto-data/team-backlog.json"), Path("../quarto-data/team-backlog.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)

d     = json.loads(data_file.read_text()) if data_file else None
group = d["group"] if d else {"name": "—", "url": "#"}
teams = d["teams"] if d else []
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date'] if d else '—'} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
<p>Per-team backlog: issues grouped by linked Feature. Teams are organized by Value Stream and ART.</p>""")
```

```{python}
if not teams:
    display(HTML("<p><em>No team data found.</em></p>"))
else:
    html = ""
    current_vs  = None
    current_art = None
    for team in teams:
        if team["vs_name"] != current_vs:
            html += f"<h2>🔷 {team['vs_name']}</h2>"
            current_vs  = team["vs_name"]
            current_art = None
        if team["art_name"] != current_art:
            html += f"<h3>{team['art_name']}</h3>"
            current_art = team["art_name"]

        team_link = (f'<a href="{team["team_url"]}" target="_blank">{team["team_name"]}</a>'
                     if team["team_url"] else team["team_name"])
        html += f"<h4>{team_link}</h4>"

        if not team["has_backlog_project"]:
            html += "<p><em>No team backlog project found for this team.</em></p>"
            continue

        backlog_link = (f'<a href="{team["backlog_url"]}" target="_blank">View Project ↗</a>'
                        if team["backlog_url"] else "")

        html += f"<p>{backlog_link}</p>" if backlog_link else ""
        html += (
            "<h5>Summary</h5>"
            '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered" style="width:auto;font-size:0.85em">'
            "<thead><tr><th></th><th>Count</th><th>Weight</th></tr></thead><tbody>"
            f"<tr><td><strong>Total issues</strong></td><td>{team['total']}</td><td>{team['total_weight']} pt</td></tr>"
            f"<tr><td>Open</td><td>{team['open']}</td><td>{team['total_weight'] - team['closed_weight']} pt</td></tr>"
            f"<tr><td>Closed</td><td>{team['closed']}</td><td>{team['closed_weight']} pt</td></tr>"
            f"<tr><td><strong>% Done</strong></td><td></td><td><strong>{team['pct_done']}%</strong></td></tr>"
            "</tbody></table>"
        )

        if team["by_feature"]:
            html += "<h5>Issues by Feature</h5>"
            for grp in team["by_feature"]:
                epic_link = (f'<a href="{grp["epic_url"]}" target="_blank">{grp["epic_title"]}</a>'
                             if grp["epic_url"] and grp["epic_url"] != "#" else grp["epic_title"])
                html += (
                    f"<details><summary>🛠️ {epic_link} "
                    f"— {grp['open']} open · {grp['pct_done']}% done "
                    f"· {grp['closed_weight']}/{grp['total_weight']} pt</summary>"
                    f"<p><strong>Feature state:</strong> {grp['epic_state']}</p>"
                    '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered" style="font-size:0.85em">'
                    "<thead><tr><th>Issue</th><th>State</th><th>Weight</th></tr></thead><tbody>"
                )
                for issue in grp["issues"]:
                    html += (
                        f'<tr><td><a href="{issue["url"]}" target="_blank">{issue["title"]}</a></td>'
                        f"<td>{issue['state']}</td><td>{issue['weight']} pt</td></tr>"
                    )
                html += "</tbody></table></details>"

        if team["unlinked"]:
            html += (
                "<h5>Unlinked Issues (no Feature)</h5>"
                '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered" style="font-size:0.85em">'
                "<thead><tr><th>Issue</th><th>State</th><th>Weight</th></tr></thead><tbody>"
            )
            for issue in team["unlinked"]:
                html += (
                    f'<tr><td><a href="{issue["url"]}" target="_blank">{issue["title"]}</a></td>'
                    f"<td>{issue['state']}</td><td>{issue['weight']} pt</td></tr>"
                )
            html += "</tbody></table>"

    display(HTML(html))
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Notes

- **Issues by Feature** — issues linked to a Feature epic via GitLab parent relationship
- **Unlinked Issues** — issues with no linked Feature
- **% Done** — closed issue weight ÷ total issue weight
- **Weight** — story-point weight assigned to each issue
:::
